analyst_note: Q3 2025: Victim count stable (1,592 — slight decline from Q2). BlackSuit takedown (Operation Checkmate, July 2025). Ecosystem highly fragmented — 47 of 85 active groups had fewer than 10 victims. Coveware Q3 2025 payment rate: 23%. Europol State of Ransomware series active. Double-extortion expansion driven by small/emerging operators. RansomHub still dominant but landscape diversified.

a1._label: Russian Domestic Actions Against Ecosystem Actors
a1.notes: No documented RU domestic actions Q3 2025. Six consecutive quarters of zero domestic enforcement. Phobos subjects (Berezhnoy, Glebov) — no extradition or RU domestic counterpart action. Consistent passive tolerance.

a2._label: Time Lag: Referral to Observable Russian Action

a3.notes: Populate from analyst model. Ecosystem fragmentation may be reducing the structural coherence of protection relationships — harder to maintain krysha when the protected entities are dispersed across 85+ groups.

events.name: Operation Checkmate — BlackSuit Ransomware Takedown
events.notes: HSI, IRS-CI, USSS, FBI, Europol seized BlackSuit extortion site and infrastructure. BlackSuit is assessed as Royal/Conti lineage. Score: 8 — significant infrastructure disruption, multi-agency international cooperation, Royal/Conti heritage makes this a structurally important group. Subjects location/arrest status: verify from DOJ press releases.

b1.notes: Operation Checkmate demonstrates continued LE pressure on Conti-lineage groups. Royal/BlackSuit represents the highest tier of Conti successor operations targeted this quarter.

b2.notes: Ecosystem highly fragmented: 47 of 85 active groups had <10 victims per Check Point Q3 2025. New brands continue emerging. Affiliate market: loyalty based on reliability/revenue share, not brand reputation. Forum activity dispersed across multiple platforms. ANALYST INFERENCE — fragmentation is confirmed by external reporting.

c1._label: Ransom Payment Volume vs. Victim Count
c1.source: Check Point Research Q3 2025 (1,592 victims); Emsisoft Summer 2025 stats; Chainalysis 2025 annual ~$820M
c1.notes: CREDIBILITY NOTE: Payment volume is ANALYST ESTIMATE from 2025 annual total. Victim count confirmed. Emsisoft Summer 2025 data: average 535 victims/month in Q2-Q3 2025, up from 420 YoY. Coveware Q3 payment rate: 23% (declining). Divergence continues — victims sustained, payments declining.

c2.notes: Coveware Q3 2025: overall payment rate 23%. Populate sector breakdown from Coveware Q3 2025 quarterly report. Professional services, healthcare, and consumer services most targeted per Coveware.

c3.source: Check Point Research Q3 2025; BlackSuit Operation Checkmate July 2025
c3.notes: BlackSuit extortion site seized — had not relaunched as of reporting. Most significant signal in the composite: failed relaunch indicates operational capacity disrupted. Victim count stable. Ecosystem driving volume through many small/new operators rather than dominant groups.
